_meta.source: Zhu et al. 2014, Ann Bot 113:1217-1228, Supplementary Methods S1 + Fig S2
_meta.extraction_method: analytical form from Eq. S1 (no figure digitization needed)
_meta.fitting_dataset: combined: Déa NS 1996 + 2000, Déa HD 2000, Nobilis NS 1998 + 2000
_meta.fitting_method: nonlinear least squares (R nls function, stats package)
_meta.cultivar_invariance_partial_validation: fit spans Déa + Nobilis cultivars at multiple densities; ratio shape held across these

equation.form: ratio_int_over_sheath(rho) = ratio_max * (2*rho_max - rho_b - rho) * (rho - rho_b) / (rho_max - rho_b)^2

variables.ratio_int_over_sheath: ratio of final internode length (rank n) to final sheath length (rank n-1)
variables.rho_b: left-hand zero of ratio (lowest rank with non-zero internode)

domain_validity.physical_interpretation: internodes 1-4 (rho < 0.24 for N_leaves=15, ≈ rank 4) are zeroed; consistent with Zhu line 127 'length of internodes 1-4 was set to zero'

rho_normalization_convention.source: Zhu Supp Method S1: 'Relative rank, defined as the ratio between current rank and final rank'

for_our_calibration._note: 16-leaf library extension (project_16leaf_extension.md). Verify against MF3D metadata if available.

rho_normalization_convention._warning: 5% mismatch in rho normalization propagates to ~15% error on ratio at upper ranks; pin N_leaves before use
